title: Tetris
description: The classic block-stacking puzzle, rebuilt with the PlayCanvas engine.

title: Sky Hopper
description: Tap to flap through glowing gates in a tiny arcade side scroller.

title: Cube Dash
description: Jump a rotating neon cube through spikes and blocks in a fast auto-runner.

title: Metro Rush
description: Swipe across three neon lanes, dodge barriers, jump gaps, slide under gates, and grab coins.
